pt:
a chuva parou
mas o cheiro dela
ainda me acompanha
en:
the rain has stopped
but its scent
still walks with me
es:
la lluvia cesó
pero su olor
aún me acompaña

pt:
o café esfriou
enquanto eu pensava em você
mas ainda serve
en:
the coffee went cold
while I was thinking of you
but it still works
es:
el café se enfrió
mientras pensaba en ti
pero aún sirve
